analysis.reasoning: Core message: Commemorates the end of WWII, asserts that China made great contributions through resistance to Japanese aggression, and calls to remember history to avoid wars, tagged #ChinaforUN75. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not supported; no criticism of the West or US. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Partly supported—emphasis on peace, new international order, remembrance to avoid wars, and UN-related hashtag portray China as aligned with peace and multilateralism. CH3 (China has an epic history): Supported—highlights China’s significant WWII resistance and contribution, fitting the theme of historical resilience against aggression. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): Not addressed; no discussion of domestic political system or governance values. CH5 (CCP succeeds): Not addressed; no claims about development or governance performance. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: CH2 and CH3 apply.
